{{CargoOrgan
|name=HS Iris
|type=Common
|rank=green
|id=10803
|idx=3
|description=The iris shows different colors under lights of different wavelengths. The iris can even capture minute objects under high wavelengths.
|skill=
|hp=310
|def=57
|atk=51
|rush=68
|gene1=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +2%
|gene2=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +2%
|gene7=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +2% (Awakened)
|}}
